purpose: Codex-reviewed diagnostic of whether close journal-entry pairs differ cleanly in behavior that supports or conflicts with Hedonism.
rules: Score Hedonism independently: choosing present pleasure or comfort can be +1 even when another commitment is harmed.
Use -1 only for clear self-denial, cancellation, or rejection of available pleasure, rest, or comfort.
Use 0 when neither direction is clearly shown and uncertain when ambiguous.
Accept a pair only if both entries are realistic and differ mainly in the behavior or choice relevant to Hedonism.
Do not infer or search for author intent, model predictions, or source metadata.

entries.journal_entry: The offer is more impressive, but the commute will erase cooking at night. I chose the stronger title and the harder days.
The offer is less impressive, but I can walk there and still cook at night. I chose the ordinary title and the easier days.
The record arrived today. I lay on the rug and listened to the whole first side without doing anything else.
The record arrived today. I left it wrapped on the shelf and used the whole evening to clear another batch of work.
There was enough time before the appointment, so I took the riverside path and stopped for the cold juice I like.
There was enough time before the appointment, but I took the direct path and passed the cold juice place without stopping.
I felt guilty seeing the unread messages, so I gave up the afternoon I had set aside and answered them from the sofa.
I felt guilty seeing the unread messages, but I kept the afternoon I had set aside and watched the film from the sofa.
The launch landed cleanly and everyone was relieved. I poured the good drink, ordered dessert, and stayed with that feeling tonight.
The launch landed cleanly and everyone was relieved. I left the good drink untouched, skipped dessert, and started tomorrow's list tonight.
Nobody needed me to take the extra review. I left it unclaimed and spent the evening shaping the little bowl at pottery class.
Nobody needed me to take the extra review. I claimed it anyway and spent the evening marking comments instead of going to pottery class.
I could polish Monday's slides again, but the concert ticket was already in my pocket. I went, sang badly, and came home smiling.
I could polish Monday's slides again, and the concert ticket was already in my pocket. I stayed, revised them, and let the ticket expire.
Sitting in the park felt undeserved with so much pending, so I left the bench and ran errands until lunch ended.
Sitting in the park felt undeserved with so much pending, but I stayed on the bench and enjoyed the sun until lunch ended.
The meeting ended early, so I sat by the window with my coffee and let myself taste it slowly before heading back upstairs.
The meeting ended early, so I carried my coffee back upstairs and opened the next deck before I had taken more than a sip.
The optional report was still open, so I skipped the chocolate cake and returned to the laptop before everyone else had finished.
The optional report was still open, but I ordered the chocolate cake and stayed at the table until I had finished every bite.
My manager asked if I could cover Saturday again. Nothing was urgent, so I said no and kept the day for the beach.
My manager asked if I could cover Saturday again. Nothing was urgent, but I said yes and dropped the day at the beach.
The smaller role pays enough and leaves my evenings alone. I accepted it because I want dinners, walks, and weekends that belong to me.
The bigger role pays more and takes most evenings. I accepted it although it means dinners, walks, and weekends will stop belonging to me.
The savings plan is ahead of target, so I booked the little coastal trip and chose a room where I can hear the water.
The savings plan is ahead of target, but I cancelled the little coastal trip and moved the room money into the account.
Mum's paperwork is still unfinished and I felt uneasy, but I went to game night and let myself laugh with everyone for once.
Mum's paperwork is still unfinished and I felt uneasy, so I cancelled game night and spent the evening sorting forms alone again.
I crossed the finish line faster than I expected. I skipped the food and music and rushed home to plan the next race.
I crossed the finish line faster than I expected. I stayed for the food and music instead of rushing home to plan the next race.
The modest flat has a sunny balcony and room for a deep chair. I chose it over the impressive address with nowhere comfortable to sit.
The impressive flat has the address people notice but nowhere comfortable to sit. I chose it over the modest place with the sunny balcony.
It was a good birthday and the report could wait. I skipped the long lunch, declined the cake, and went back to the report.
It was a good birthday and the report could wait. I took the long lunch, ordered the cake, and enjoyed being fussed over.
The expense forms were not due, and the water looked perfect. I stayed inside to finish them and watched the pool lights come on.
The expense forms were not due, and the water looked perfect. I left them for tomorrow and swam until the lights came on.
I was worn out after the commute, but I filled the bath and stayed in the warm water until my shoulders finally loosened.
I was worn out after the commute, but I skipped the bath and folded laundry until the tightness in my shoulders felt normal again.
The promotion finally came through after all those late nights. I booked our favorite restaurant and let the evening feel like a reward.
The promotion finally came through after all those late nights. I skipped our favorite restaurant and used the evening to start the new workload.
The draft was already good enough, so I shut the laptop at six and went to the dinner I had been looking forward to.
The draft was already good enough, but I kept the laptop open past six and missed the dinner I had been looking forward to.
The planning call was optional and I was finally on leave, but I joined the thread and stayed upstairs from the pool.
The planning call was optional and I was finally on leave, so I muted the thread and went down to the pool.
Part of me said a nap was lazy, but I closed the curtains and slept for an hour because my body was asking for it.
Part of me said a nap was lazy, so I left the curtains open and kept working for an hour although my body was asking for it.
I made the noodles I like, kept my laptop open, and ate them quickly at the table while answering messages from work.
I made the noodles I like, put my phone away, and ate them slowly at the table while the apartment was quiet.
